creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 199237
sbcl license standardization patch

I changed the license block by using the standard licenses list.

SBCL is released mainly under public domain or FreeBSD license (which, according to wikipedia, is BSD2CLAUSE). The solution now in the ports tree is to create a new license that combines them and pointing to the file with all the details. I propose to set LICENSE= PD BSD2CLAUSE along with LICENSE_COMB= dual while keeping the same explanatory file in LICENSE_FILE.

This solution avoids to create a new license, with its own name and permissions.
